feedback.positive_factors: Good team, flexible working, and leadership is approachable.
feedback.general_sentiment: Generally positive; a few process improvements would help.

feedback.confidence_reasons: Clear strategy and recent wins in the market.

feedback.what_makes_people_feel_valued: Recognition in team meetings and opportunities to lead projects.
feedback.what_reduces_that_feeling: Lack of visibility for remote contributions.

feedback.positive_views: Good intent and it's starting to change the candidate mix.
feedback.concerns: Worry that referrals could reinforce existing networks if not monitored.
feedback.impact_perception: Seen as a step in the right direction; too early to judge impact.

feedback.evidence_of_impact: More diverse shortlists in the last two hiring rounds.
feedback.doubts_or_limitations: Still limited data; need longer-term tracking.

feedback.strengths: Training for hiring managers and clear referral guidelines.
feedback.successful_actions: Including D&I in leadership goals and sharing progress internally.

feedback.improvement_suggestions: More transparency on outcomes (e.g. hire rates by referral vs non-referral) and dedicated D&I roles in each region.

feedback.inclusive_behaviours: Inclusive language in comms and diverse panels for interviews.
feedback.areas_of_exclusion: Some team socials are not accessible for remote or part-time staff.

feedback.reasons_for_comfort: Manager encourages input and we have regular retros.
feedback.barriers_to_speaking_up: Senior stakeholders sometimes dismiss ideas without discussion.

feedback.leadership_strengths: Visible sponsorship of the initiative and talking about it in all-hands.
feedback.leadership_gaps: Would like to see more diverse representation in senior leadership itself.

feedback.positive_compensation_aspects: Benefits package and annual review process.
feedback.compensation_concerns: Raises have not kept pace with inflation in the last two years.

feedback.competitive_factors: Base salary is in line with market for some roles.
feedback.gaps_vs_market: Bonus and equity are below what competitors offer for similar levels.

feedback.growth_strengths: Internal mobility is encouraged and there are learning budgets.
feedback.growth_barriers: Promotion criteria could be clearer; some roles are filled externally without internal consideration.

feedback.recognition_strengths: Spot awards and shout-outs in team channels.
feedback.recognition_issues: Recognition feels uneven across departments; some managers rarely nominate people.

feedback.reasons_to_recommend: Culture, people, and the work itself.
feedback.reasons_not_to_recommend: Pay and pace of change on career progression.

feedback.top_improvement_area: Tie compensation and progression more clearly to performance and market, and improve transparency on both.
